purpose: Tier-1 trigger eval: does a query activate `orient` (builder-led recon of the codebase before any task board exists)? Hardest negatives are `ba-pitch-analyzer` (decompose, the step after) and `shapeup` (frame, the step before).

cases.query: scout the codebase for where this pitch touches the code
do an orient pass before we map scopes
read the code first and surface the unknowns before we plan
spike the riskiest part of this before mapping scopes
break this pitch into a task board
shape this feature before we build it
evaluate the build against the spec
run the whole harness end to end
rename this variable across the whole repo
